cross_concept_flag_origin_provenance.name: cross_concept_flag_origin_provenance
cross_concept_flag_origin_provenance.value:
("cross_concept_flag"."origin" = 'stage1_cross_concept' and "cross_concept_flag"."source_observation_id" is not null and "cross_concept_flag"."from_sub_topic_id" is not null)
       or ("cross_concept_flag"."origin" = 'stage2_synthesis' and "cross_concept_flag"."source_session_id" is not null)
